description:
Configure Screaming Frog to crawl https://books.toscrape.com/ and extract four specific meta tag values using Custom Extraction with these XPath expressions:
- Viewport: //meta[@name='viewport']/@content
- Charset: //meta[@charset]/@charset
- OG Title: //meta[@property='og:title']/@content
- OG Image: //meta[@property='og:image']/@content
Export the extraction results to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/meta_extraction.csv. Write a meta tag completeness report to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/meta_completeness_report.txt containing the total page count, counts of found tags for each type, and recommendations.
